title: Pufferz
description: Want more aquatic animals & plants to fill your aquariums? Well then look no further!
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac482b0a96ffb839df233944fac2a578d21480d4.png)
# Pufferz

* cool fish 🐟
* crustaceans!! 🦞
* awesome delicacies 🍙
* make lively aquariums! 🌿
* NOW WITH 100% MORE ALGAE WAFERS ⚡⚡⚡


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
![longhorn cowfish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fdfe15a79128b2a434a19dbda6e1fb1424ecc0e.png)

### Fish
* Royal Gramma ⟶ _Warm Ocean_
* Longhorn Cowfish ⟶ _Warm Ocean_
* Corydora ⟶ _River_
* Seahorse ⟶ _Normal, Lukewarm and Warm Ocean_

![slipper lobster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1b776d4b1ec0796bb28c8908855caec9c6e74e6.png)

### Crustaceans
* Slipper Lobster ⟶ _Lukewarm Ocean_

![corydora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c144a184d7f41572aad6be00d7b721211274b02f.png)

### Plants
* Waterweed
* Brazilian Pennywort
* Ludwigia Arcuata
* Spiny Naiad

![anemone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aca7dc3715f20e41c277c81d8dda333a8ed1a1a.png)

### Statics
* Anemone

### Items
* Algae Wafer ⟶ _heals your fishes, crustaceans and amphibians_
* Slipper Lobster Tail ⟶ _raw & cooked_
* Stuffed Slipper Lobster ⟶ _crafted with a cooked slipper lobster tail, a carrot and sweet berries_

</details>

_it's reccomended that you play this mod along with JEI/REI to know the recipes!_

---

[![discord join](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e0557a1903ca61b1960adb45b5c5a62e619a41.png)](https://discord.gg/QR77j3Jas8)
